messages:
## 仓库顶层目录和文件（简单分组）

### 📁 目录
| 分类 | 条目 |
|------|------|
| **项目目录** | UI/, crates/, data/, docs/, document/, image/, pi_app/, plan/, plans/, run/, services/ |
| **配置目录** | configs/, patches/, prompts/, .vscode/ |
| **构建/开发** | .cargo/, target/, docker/ |
| **脚本/工具** | scripts/, skill_develop/, skills_output/, external_skills/ |
| **系统/日志** | .git/, .pids/, logs/, tmp/, systemd/ |
| **依赖目录** | node_modules/, migrations/ |

### 📄 文件
| 分类 | 条目 |
|------|------|
| **文档** | README.md, README.zh-CN.md, README_cn.md, AGENTS.md, USAGE.md, RUSTCLAW_SERVICE_README.md, LICENSE, LICENSE.zh-CN.md |
| **配置** | Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, package.json, package-lock.json, .env.example, .dockerignore, .gitignore, docker-compose.yml, rustclaw.service |
| **脚本** | build-all.sh, build-ui-nginx.sh, check-logs.sh, cross-build-upload.sh, cross-build-upload-cloud.sh, install-rustclaw-cmd.sh, local-cross-build-upload-pi.sh, pack-to-parent.sh, package-release.sh, push-sanitized-configs.sh, setup-config.sh, simulate-telegramd.sh, start-all.sh, start-all-bin.sh, start-clawd.sh, start-clawd-ui.sh, start-feishud.sh, start-future-adapters.sh, start-larkd.sh, start-telegramd.sh, start-wa-web-bridge.sh, start-wechatd.sh, start-whatsapp-webd.sh, start-whatsappd.sh, stop-rustclaw.sh, system_report.sh, uninstall-rustclaw-cmd.sh, git-add-exclude.sh |
| **图片** | RustClaw.png, RustClaw480X320.png, longxia.png |
| **其他** | failed-routing-cases.md, memory-usage-plan.md, path_note.txt, pwd_report.txt, test_contract.sqlite, rustclaw (可执行文件) |
